---LINKEDIN---
[Professional LinkedIn post under 200 words. Include 3 relevant hashtags.]

---X/TWITTER---
[Punchy tweet under 280 characters. Include 2 relevant hashtags.]

Write each post to feel natural and human. Do not use corporate jargon.

parameters.content:
## 🟠 LEVEL 1 · Brand Content from RSS Feed
Template by: Nina Thomas | People in the Loop
ninathomas.ai

**What this workflow does:**
Watches any RSS news feed. Every time a new article is published, Claude writes 3 platform-specific social posts (Instagram, LinkedIn, X/Twitter) and delivers them to your inbox — ready to copy and paste.

**Tools used:** n8n · Claude (Anthropic) · Gmail
**Skill level:** Beginner
**Setup time:** ~15 minutes

---

**SETUP STEPS:**
1. Connect your Anthropic API key → Claude Model node
2. Connect your Gmail account → Send Content Email node
3. Update the `sendTo` email address in Send Content Email
4. Replace the RSS feed URL in RSS Feed Trigger with your own
5. Click **Test workflow** to confirm it runs
6. Click **Activate** to turn it on

**Built live at:** n8n Meetup Atlanta · April 22, 2026
**All files:** peopleintheloop.app/n8n_0422

## 🔑 CREDENTIAL 1 — Anthropic API Key
*(connects to the Claude Model node)*

**How to get your key:**
1. Go to console.anthropic.com
2. Sign in or create a free account
3. Click **API Keys** in the left sidebar
4. Click **Create Key** → copy it

**How to add it in n8n:**
1. In n8n, go to **Credentials** (left sidebar)
2. Click **+ Add credential**
3. Search for **Anthropic**
4. Paste your API key → Save
5. Open the **Claude Model** node and select this credential

⚠️ Free tier has usage limits. Paid plans start at $5/month.

## 🔑 CREDENTIAL 2 — Gmail (Google OAuth2)
*(connects to the Send Content Email node)*

**How to connect Gmail in n8n:**
1. In n8n, go to **Credentials** (left sidebar)
2. Click **+ Add credential**
3. Search for **Gmail** or **Google OAuth2**
4. Click **Connect** — a Google sign-in window will open
5. Sign in and grant n8n permission to send email
6. Open the **Send Content Email** node and select this credential
7. Update the **Send To** field with your email address

💡 You can use any Gmail account. n8n only sends — it cannot read your inbox.

## 📡 RSS FEED — Swap Your Source

The demo uses the UGA Cooperative Extension Peach Blog:
`site.extension.uga.edu/peaches/feed/`

**To use your own feed:**
Open the **RSS Feed Trigger** node and replace the Feed URL.

**Finding RSS feed URLs:**
- WordPress blogs: `yoursite.com/feed`
- Most blogs: `yoursite.com/rss` or `yoursite.com/rss.xml`
- Industry publications: check the footer for an RSS icon
- Or Google: `[publication name] RSS feed`

**Polling interval:**
Currently set to every hour. You can change this to every 15 minutes, daily, or any schedule in the node settings.

## ✅ READY FOR LEVEL 2?

Level 2 adds two upgrades:
- Claude writes every post in **your brand's voice** (you define the personality, tone, and CTAs)
- An **AI-generated image** is created for each article and embedded in the email

Get the Level 2 file at:
**peopleintheloop.app/n8n_0422**

That page also has:
→ A brand voice prompt template to fill out
→ Setup instructions for Cloudflare Workers AI (free image generation)
→ The bonus Claude skill file

---
Built by Nina Thomas | n8n Community Ambassador
